headline: Regency Centers Invites You to Join Its First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
summary: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., March 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Regency Centers Corporation (“Regency Centers” or the “Company”) (NASDAQ: REG) will announce its first quarter 2026 earnings results on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, after the market closes. The Company’s earnings release and supplemental information package will be posted on the Investor Relations section of the Company’s website – investors.regencycenters.com. The Company will host an earnings conference call on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 1
